Carry CAPA live API toggle replication into Phase 3 planning only after cross-browser baseline blocker is resolved. |
_reports/module-template-v4/V21_PHASE2_STREAM_STATUS_MATRIX.md:9:| Live API NQCASE | `LIVE_API_TOGGLE_NQCASE_PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` | `mom/scripts/portal/70-module-template-v4-hydration.js`; `tests/e2e/module-template-v4-live-api.spec.ts`; `tests/e2e/package.json`; `tests/fixtures/module-template-v4/pages/authoritative-record-shell-nc-live-mode.html`; `docs/adr/0011-live-api-toggle-mechanism.md`; report file | Toggle remains opt-in; default fixture mode unchanged; GET `/api/v1/nonconformance-cases/{id}` captured; response adapted; error fallback verified; mutation buttons disabled; focused live API spec passed 3/3 | Full Chromium module-template-v4 suite in that stream failed with existing visual drift and a missing live-mode visual baseline at the time | No default-live or mutation blocker reported; visual drift belongs to QA baseline stream | Follow-up hardening only | Keep opt-in only. Replicate toggle pattern to CAPA in Phase 3 planning, not as a Phase 2 repair. |
_reports/module-template-v4/V21_PHASE2_STREAM_STATUS_MATRIX.md:10:| Transactional REST C2 | `TRANSACTIONAL_REST_PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` | `mom/api/controllers/OrderController.php`; `mom/api/routes/rest-routes.php`; `mom/api/openapi.yaml`; endpoint catalog/index JSON; `mom/tests/contract/TransactionalRestTest.php`; `mom/tests/contract/TransactionalLegacyRedirectTest.php`; report file | PHP syntax passed; focused contract tests reported `36 tests, 153 assertions`; endpoint catalog JSON verified; canonical plural routes and legacy redirects covered | Local curl smoke returned `400 Bad Request` in local front-controller setup; PHPStan blocked by existing EQMS-controller debt; full PHPUnit exits `255` before normal summary in this environment | No C2-specific focused contract blocker reported | No immediate Phase 2 repair unless broader backend validation is explicitly approved | Keep additive C2 paths. Document broader PHPStan/PHPUnit debt separately; do not create extra backend APIs in this integration review. |
_reports/module-template-v4/V21_PHASE2_STREAM_STATUS_MATRIX.md:11:| Cross-browser D4 | `CROSS_BROWSER_FAIL_BLOCK_NEXT` | `tests/e2e/module-template-v4-visual.spec.ts`; Firefox and WebKit visual snapshot files; Playwright config behavior per report | Firefox and WebKit baseline update and verification passed 41/41 each; full matrix had Firefox 113/0/7 and WebKit 113/0/7 | Chromium baselines were not regenerated due prompt prohibition; CI should remain Chromium-only until Chromium drift is repaired | Current main is blocked by existing Chromium visual baseline drift: 8 failed Chromium visual pages in D4 report | Yes, but only after explicit approval | Create Chromium baseline repair plan. If source render is correct, regenerate only approved Chromium snapshots and verify Chromium visual spec. |
_reports/module-template-v4/V21_PHASE2_STREAM_STATUS_MATRIX.md:15:The first three streams are accepted as landed Phase 2 development/prototype work with documented warnings. ## fixture JSON parse

Command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib, sys
base = pathlib.Path('tests/fixtures/module-template-v4')
failed = []
for p in base.rglob('*.json'):
    try:
        json.loads(p.read_text())
        print('PASS json', p)
    except Exception as e:
        print('FAIL json', p, e)
        failed.append((str(p), str(e)))
if failed:
    sys.exit(1)
PY

## cat mom/composer.json

Command:
cat mom/composer.json

Output:
~~~text
{
    "name": "hesem/mom-portal",
    "description": "HESEM Manufacturing Operations Management Portal - ERP/MOM/MES/EQMS",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "proprietary",
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.5",
        "lcobucci/jwt": "^5.4",
        "php-amqplib/php-amqplib": "^3.7",
        "phpoffice/phpspreadsheet": "^5.6",
        "predis/predis": "^2.2",
        "symfony/console": "^6.4"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.5",
        "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.12"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "MOM\\Api\\Controllers\\": "api/controllers/",
            "MOM\\Api\\Middleware\\": "api/middleware/",
            "MOM\\Api\\Validators\\": "api/validators/",
            "MOM\\Api\\Services\\": "api/services/",
            "MOM\\Api\\": "api/",
            "MOM\\Services\\": "api/services/",
            "MOM\\Database\\": "database/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "MOM\\Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "sort-packages": true,
        "platform": {
            "php": "8.5.5"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "test": "php -d memory_limit=1G vendor/bin/phpunit",
        "analyse": "php -d memory_limit=1G vendor/bin/phpstan analyse",
        "check": [
            "@analyse",
            "@test"
        ],
        "ai:index": "php ../tools/scripts/ai-index/generate.php"
    }
}

~~~
